It and the split amulets are tied to the seal that holds back the demon world, much like in DMC3. It’s on Earth to maintain that seal and keep humanity safe. Why it was in the Vatican specifically, is never stated but it’s implied to keep the keys to the dark realm as far away from each other as possible because, when you think about it, keeping such things in such close proximity to each other that someone ballsy enough could easily get them and open the doors is kind of a bad idea. 

Going back to why it was in the Vatican, I suppose most people wouldn’t think to look for a DEMON sword in the HOLIEST city on Earth, as the rabbit pointed out.

Honestly, watch a few episodes before you decide it’s good or bad.
